title: chylismia claviformis subsp. claviformis
intro: Chylismia claviformis subsp. claviformis, also known as Desert Marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Desert Marigold include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Desert Marigold can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
